title: Job Opening Category Manager at ID Fresh Food Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at ID Fresh Food Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ID Fresh Food Holdings Services! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ID Fresh Food Holdings Services:
ID Fresh Food Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ID Fresh Food Holdings Services!
